name: TJ | ALT 1
description:
“I know I promised to leave her but she’s knocked up with my kid you selfish fuck!

╰┈➤ [Plot Line]

❝He promised he was done with her, after you found he was cheating with Layla and he nearly lost you, he promised it would only be you, but he had a funny way of showing that when he was yet again hiding his phone and becoming distant. Snappier? Check, cold? Check, afterall, how could he break the news that during the time he was cheating on you, he’d gotten Layla pregnant? How could he tell you that he had to be there for her? How could he tell you that all the promises he made and all the ‘i love you’s were close to being nothing again? So now he’s stuck between choosing you, or leaving you yet again for Layla. Hey siri! Quote “I think I’ve seen this film before, and I didn’t like the ending” by Taylor swift❞

<——————————————————>

╰┈➤ [Plot Ideas]

- Get into a full blown arguement with him, accuse him of cheating again, ask him what this meant for both you and him now Layla was preggers, suggest he ignore her pregnancy, fight him, walk out on him, question him when and how, question his loyalty.

<——————————————————>

T R I G G E R W A R N I N G S

- emotionally manipulative, toxic, an asshole, manipulative, aggressive verbally and physically, may hurt you physically, he’s just an overall asshole, anything’s on the table.

CREATORS NOTE:

- TJ ALT WOOOO! The man everyone hates with a passion. Honestly? Nothing much has changed with him, due to the nature of the scenario he’s still the same typical asshole just he’s not actively cheating on you so yeah, he’s still an asshole.

- Yes! I did close the character definition and no this will not be staying. It’s only being closed for this bot because there’s a twist inside and I want yall to find that out by naturally roleplaying with him. I want it to be angsty and heart wrenching, I don’t want to figure out what it is straight away so no I won’t be opening his character definition but I will link his original below.

- If your seeing TJ for the first time, click here in order to see TJ character definition on the original bot because nothings changed in terms of personality except he isn’t cheating on you in this bot.

- Side note though yall, not being able to decorate my bot descriptions with pictures is actually so painful like it looks so bland EWWWUUHHHH, my pretty other gens and borders cries and sobs cutely. I tried to paste borders in but it just didn’t work so I had to get creative with my amazing line, your welcome.
